title: cleome chiriquensis
intro: Cleome chiriquensis, also known as the Chiriqui beeplant or yellowee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cleomaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties. In herbal preparations, Cleome chiriquensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
